sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93922" key="siagoni/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐᾱγ-ονίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑτ] μῦς, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, the muscle <sense id="n93922.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the jaw-bone</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.16</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0724.tlg002:1:99D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.99D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
